title: Assertion failure in rel_bin.c for MERGE INTO command
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ProductTarget (ProductID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ProductNumber BIGINT, Color VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE ProductSource (ProductID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ProductNumber BIGINT, Color VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO ProductSource (Name, ProductNumber, Color) VALUES ('Widget', 1001, 'Red');
INSERT INTO ProductTarget (Name, ProductNumber, Color) VALUES ('Gadget', NULL, 'Blue');
UPDATE ProductTarget T JOIN ProductSource S ON T.ProductID = S.ProductID SET T.Name = S.Name, T.Color = COALESCE(S.Color, 'Unknown') WHERE S.ProductID IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during MERGE INTO command execution
